headline: UFC to Return to Azerbaijan in a Multi-Year Partnership With Baku City Circuit
summary: LAS VEGAS & BAKU, Azerbaijan, April 21, 2026--UFC, the world’s premier mixed martial arts organisation, together with the Ministry of Youth and Sports of the Republic of Azerbaijan and Baku City Circuit Operations Company (BCC), today announced a multi-year agreement that will bring UFC Fight Nights once a year to Baku through 2028, starting with UFC FIGHT NIGHT BAKU on Saturday, June 27 at the National Gymnastics Arena.
